novelty: Root-caused the adherence gap as salience-driven conditional misfire (not broken $ARGUMENTS injection); DeepSeek negates the empty-guard, Kimi/MiMo anchor on the salient ask-path.

focus: KQ2 --command vs direct-prompt vs natural conversation
novelty: Characterized the three surfaces; deterministic renderer trades latitude for cross-model consistency (shape variance ~0), model-driven trades consistency for richness (high field-selection variance).
ruledOut: probe adherence with raw slash text

focus: KQ3 structural arg-presence vs emptiness heuristic
novelty: Designed a four-layer robust contract: deterministic ARGS_PRESENT flag via !`…` shell injection, salience inversion (execute-first), imperative no-ask guard, explicit arg echo — moves the branch out of model judgment.

focus: KQ4 mandated output fields for cross-surface parity
novelty: Mandate one score/one scale/one name: similarity 0-1 two decimals (never confidence/percentage) + query echo, id, title, STATUS footer on ALL surfaces; promote requestQuality/citationPolicy to named optional fields.
ruledOut: let each model pick its metric

novelty: Framework fit is a real but secondary lever (benchmarks measured coding correctness/format, not command control-flow); the COSTAR register is the shared intersection for the weak followers; structural fix (KQ3) is primary.
ruledOut: one global framework for all commands
framework fit alone closes the gap
